channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New discovery overturns 80-year-old theory of turbulence
item.description: Researchers found a way to reverse energy flow in turbulence, challenging a theory that has stood for over 80 years.

item.title: Scientists simulate nuclear fireball and find unexpected fallout
item.description: Scientists at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory recreated part of a nuclear fireball's chaos to better understand radioactive fallout.

item.title: Venus to be occulted by the Moon in a rare June celestial event
item.description: June's night sky features several highlights, starting with a close conjunction of Venus and Jupiter after sunset. Mercury joins the pair to form a...

item.title: Anxiety reversed by scientists through repair of a small brain circuit
item.description: A newly discovered group of amygdala neurons appears to be key to anxiety and social behavior. Restoring normal activity in this small brain circui...
